stem: A quality control study surveys 100 manufactured units and observes 17 positive outcomes out of 100 (17.0%). Estimate the true product defect rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.17. Wilson 95% CI: [0.1089, 0.2555]. Point estimate: 0.1822.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
